thesis_hint: Recent 3-cycle quality is declining again (VVV v7 0.5323 -> BABY BB reclaim 0.0000 -> BABY Keltner reclaim 0.0000), so stop exploration and return to the best-performing family. Use VVV funding snapback v7 as the base and improve only the weak trending regime without damaging the strong ranging edge: keep ranging PF >= 1.20 and transitional PF >= 1.00, but test one lever per variant only — earlier trend-failure exit, stronger funding-extreme threshold, or dynamic size haircut in trending conditions.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with profit_factor >= 1.15 and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.5; abort any variant with total_trades < 180, ranging profit_factor < 1.20, trending profit_factor <= 0.95, or max_drawdown_pct > 10.0.
